name: APK Cloud Launchpad
description: One-click Heroku Flask proxy for the remote Codespaces APK builder.

REMOTE_BUILDER_BASE_URL.description: Public HTTPS URL of your running codespace-builder service.

REMOTE_BUILDER_TOKEN.description: Optional shared secret. Use the same value as BUILDER_SHARED_SECRET on the builder service.

GITHUB_ACCESS_TOKEN.description: Optional GitHub token used to auto-start the Codespace when the builder is sleeping.

GITHUB_CODESPACE_NAME.description: Optional GitHub Codespace name to wake before forwarding build requests.

GITHUB_API_VERSION.description: Optional GitHub API version header value.

REMOTE_BUILDER_HEALTH_PATH.description: Health endpoint path on the builder service.

BUILDER_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS.description: Timeout in seconds for proxied builder requests.

CODESPACE_START_TIMEOUT_SECONDS.description: Maximum time in seconds to wait for the builder to become healthy after waking the Codespace.

CODESPACE_WAKE_COOLDOWN_SECONDS.description: Minimum delay between repeated wake attempts.

API_RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS.description: Per-IP API request limit for the configured window.

API_RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_SECONDS.description: Rate limit window size in seconds.
